Manthan Ed-Tech

Learning Fundamentals, Uncovered

Our Mission

Demystifying Tech, One Concept at a Time

Manthan – Learning Fundamentals Uncovered is your guide to demystifying the world of computer science and engineering, FinTech, and MedTech. At Manthan, we believe that no concept is truly out of reach — it just hasn't been explained in the right way.

Each issue delivers deeply researched insights on contemporary tech topics — from core concepts to hands-on implementation. Whether you're a student, early professional, or seasoned expert, Manthan breaks down complex subjects for everyone.

Our mission: Bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and real-world application. Stay curious, stay informed — welcome to the future of tech learning!

Founder's Vision

Why Manthan Exists

"Manthan was born out of a frustration I know many of you share — the feeling of sitting in a lecture hall or staring at a textbook, surrounded by concepts that feel just slightly out of grasp. I started this blog because I believe the gap between confusion and understanding is never about intelligence; it's always about perspective.

My vision is to build a space where CS and Engineering are not gatekept by dense academia or intimidating complexity, but made accessible, practical, and genuinely exciting for every learner at every stage. Manthan isn't just a blog — it's a community for those who dare to ask 'but why does it actually work that way?'"

Dattesh Sukhadia
Founder, Manthan Ed-Tech · CS @ McMaster University
The Team

Meet Team Manthan

Behind every article is a passionate group of learners, researchers, and builders who believe that great ideas deserve clear explanations. Together, we're on a mission to make tech accessible, exciting, and impactful — for everyone.

What We Cover
Topics Built for Curious Minds
💻
CS & Engineering

Algorithms, data structures, systems design, ML fundamentals — explained from first principles with practical implementation.

🏦
FinTech

Digital payments, blockchain, algorithmic trading, and the technology reshaping how the world moves money.

🧬
MedTech

AI in diagnostics, wearable health tech, and the intersection of medicine and engineering innovation.

🤖
AI & Machine Learning

From neural networks to large language models — deep dives into how modern AI systems are built and deployed.

☁️
Cloud & Data

Data pipelines, cloud platforms (Azure, Fabric), and the engineering practices powering scalable systems.

🔍
Hands-On Deep Dives

Step-by-step tutorials, real-world case studies, and implementation walkthroughs for every skill level.
